mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (conversation_id, user_id, type, content, emotion, confidence, is_read, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{emotion}, #{confidence}, #{isRead}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET emotion = #{emotion}, confidence = #{confidence}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, type, content, emotion, confidence, conversation_id, is_read, create_time FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{cid} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, type, content, emotion, confidence, conversation_id, is_read, create_time FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{cid} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET conversation_id = #{conversationId}, user_id = #{userId}, type = #{type}, content = #{content}, emotion = #{emotion}, confidence = #{confidence}, is_read = #{isRead}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
